creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Thanks for the submission!

But I need to wait for 3.2.3.  There way too many bugs with spamd to publish this right now.

I have been tracking, no less than 10 patches to 3.2.2 in spamassassin users group, most with spamd.

I hope that 3.2.3 is just a bugfix upgrade for 3.2.2, and if so, and it does not cause more problems, I will update then.

(sorry, but if I update to 3.2.2 I will gets lots of PR's)
